rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding or modifying AGREE annex clauses in the correct scope
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Ensure all AGREE expressions have valid types by aligning helper declarations with expression types
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate annex scope
Ensure all AGREE expressions have valid types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq` helpers for complex expressions in guarantees
Use `assume` for input constraints and `guarantee` for output constraints
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; delete invalid clauses instead
irrelevant_topics: flyByWire_hard package or property set visibility
AADL timing properties and unit tokens in AGREE annexes
